visa_types.name: Seafarer
visa_types.documents_required:
Seafarer Joining Vessel (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4b1jXDQ7z9nBylfxmnCy3x/f14473a186a6a7021b8aa2775faf5ac4/Seafarers-oct-2025.pdf)
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Sweden Visa Application Form - English  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/25iqIrNifHA87D1EedNd76/dda038f9f5e09fa700987d9d8c132924/Application_for_Schengen_VISAA.pdf)
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/ijPiNg9QFedoBp35d7ixh/27bff7597935f35cfbd07d909bcd8ae6/9bbfdd8f-fe99-492e-9912-5cf132f1bd46.pdf)
Note:
Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Seafarer]
Please note: 
The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/Visiting-Sweden/Fees.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee.
Service charge:

[Table:  Business/Conference/Sports]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/swe/additional-services)
 
for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS Service charges and other charges) can be paid in cash/ debit card/ credit card/ QR code.
visa_types.processing_time:
If you apply in VFS Global Center, the processing time is 15 days once the application arrives to Sweden Embassy depending on the total number of
applications per day and it may take longer in some cases.
For non-Filipino applicants the processing time might take some longer, but a decision will still be made within 15 days from submitting the application. The reason for the extended processing time is that we cannot issue visas to citizens of certain countries before we have consulted other Schengen member states. This process takes up to seven days.

visa_types.overview:
Overview

                                                                                When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the SwedenEmbassy in Bangkok for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled
                                                                            
Only seamen who are nationals from a country which is required to have a valid visa to enter the Schengen space need to apply for a seamen transit visa and if they intend to join
                                                                                a ship that is (or will be) in a Schengen port, land with the aim of join another ship that is (or will arrive) in a Schengen port, or land due to sickness, repatriation,
                                                                                holiday and so on.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

                                                                                When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the SwedenEmbassy in Bangkok for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled
                                                                            
Only seamen who are nationals from a country which is required to have a valid visa to enter the Schengen space need to apply for a seamen transit visa and if they intend to join
                                                                                a ship that is (or will be) in a Schengen port, land with the aim of join another ship that is (or will arrive) in a Schengen port, or land due to sickness, repatriation,
                                                                                holiday and so on.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Seafarer]
Please note: 
The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/Visiting-Sweden/Fees.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee.
Service charge:

[Table:  Business/Conference/Sports]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/swe/additional-services)
 
for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS Service charges and other charges) can be paid in cash/ debit card/ credit card/ QR code.

## Documents Required
Seafarer Joining Vessel (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4b1jXDQ7z9nBylfxmnCy3x/f14473a186a6a7021b8aa2775faf5ac4/Seafarers-oct-2025.pdf)
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Sweden Visa Application Form - English  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/25iqIrNifHA87D1EedNd76/dda038f9f5e09fa700987d9d8c132924/Application_for_Schengen_VISAA.pdf)
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/ijPiNg9QFedoBp35d7ixh/27bff7597935f35cfbd07d909bcd8ae6/9bbfdd8f-fe99-492e-9912-5cf132f1bd46.pdf)
Note:
Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 
General
- The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization). 
- Use coloured photo with plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old (not used in any visas).
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly (hair behind ears).
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–90% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form
- Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
If you apply in VFS Global Center, the processing time is 15 days once the application arrives to Sweden Embassy depending on the total number of
applications per day and it may take longer in some cases.
For non-Filipino applicants the processing time might take some longer, but a decision will still be made within 15 days from submitting the application. The reason for the extended processing time is that we cannot issue visas to citizens of certain countries before we have consulted other Schengen member states. This process takes up to seven days.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form
English application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2VvEVIJ9r7u46xBL8taCQD/c5b169adbc9b0dd5616398638d0cb4c9/English-Application-Form-New.pdf)
Swedish application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7oySjO8PdYZPxqpgCPS8v4/96f33868ed581230b4754c7c139ae124/Swedish-Applicaiton-Form-New.pdf)
Invitation – Before application for Schengen visa (migrationsverket.se) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3uMSp63CMp1qBI5AD0WxoD/c569919fa930fd7ff5ab5f1d542e8bfc/241011_Inbjudan_en.pdf)

visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tWGyKzKqGusLJ0ZSjrBAC/fcdf39ea93268087828c52784263b122/Tourism-oct-2025.pdf), also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection. Collection.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.

Sweden Visa Application Form - English  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/IJBkP3hgROGTMvDEGYkYb/0b707945b0dc1d1c748733bc3719e684/Application_for_Schengen_Visa11.pdf)
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2B7e675XsTzuZoeUuOuC42/ec23a5c5bd7bb74b82fb76b78c7d1d64/cc168f6a-c067-4eb9-af1c-19f282534e89.pdf)
Note:
Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Note:
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.
- Accredited Travel Insurance (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1EOjik8UlKou1UqQhmS3Ry/670ab632f80c89f177023053d1b3ebe0/List-of-Schengen-Insurance-Companies-Nov-25__1_.pdf)
Note: Travel Medical Insurance issued by Russian insurance companies are not accepted for entry into Sweden and travellers must hold a Travel Medical Insurance issued by a company outside Russia and that fulfils the requirements in the Visa Code.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Tourist]
Please note: 
The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/Visiting-Sweden/Fees.html) for other exceptions
                                                                                    to the visa fee.
Service charge:

[Table:  Tourist]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/swe/additional-services)
 
for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS Service charges and other charges) can be paid in cash/ debit card/ credit card/ QR code.

## Documents Required
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tWGyKzKqGusLJ0ZSjrBAC/fcdf39ea93268087828c52784263b122/Tourism-oct-2025.pdf), also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection. Collection.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.

Sweden Visa Application Form - English  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/IJBkP3hgROGTMvDEGYkYb/0b707945b0dc1d1c748733bc3719e684/Application_for_Schengen_Visa11.pdf)
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2B7e675XsTzuZoeUuOuC42/ec23a5c5bd7bb74b82fb76b78c7d1d64/cc168f6a-c067-4eb9-af1c-19f282534e89.pdf)
Note:
Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Note:
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.
- Accredited Travel Insurance (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1EOjik8UlKou1UqQhmS3Ry/670ab632f80c89f177023053d1b3ebe0/List-of-Schengen-Insurance-Companies-Nov-25__1_.pdf)
Note: Travel Medical Insurance issued by Russian insurance companies are not accepted for entry into Sweden and travellers must hold a Travel Medical Insurance issued by a company outside Russia and that fulfils the requirements in the Visa Code.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 
General
- The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization). 
- Use coloured photo with plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old (not used in any visas).
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly (hair behind ears).
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–90% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
If you apply in VFS Global Center, the processing time is 15 days once the application arrives to Sweden Embassy depending on the total number of
applications per day and it may take longer in some cases.
For non-Filipino applicants the processing time might take some longer, but a decision will still be made within 15 days from submitting the application. The reason for the extended processing time is that we cannot issue visas to citizens of certain countries before we have consulted other Schengen member states. This process takes up to seven days.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form
English application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5g73aNOPMxzChgXEEkJIHC/428757e340bbbb6e0f529172902af003/English-Application-Form-New.pdf)
Swedish application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3CCAmtRGGP6ligCLjIClul/9a5d523dfaf0b3f669682c277c199bf4/Swedish-Applicaiton-Form-New.pdf)

To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting their family or relatives in Sweden. The referent has to fill out an invitation form called appendix E.
visa_types.full_text:

This visa is provided for those who are visiting their family or relatives in Sweden. The referent has to fill out an invitation form called appendix E.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Friend - Family Visit ]
Please  Note:

English application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2VvEVIJ9r7u46xBL8taCQD/c5b169adbc9b0dd5616398638d0cb4c9/English-Application-Form-New.pdf)
Swedish application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7oySjO8PdYZPxqpgCPS8v4/96f33868ed581230b4754c7c139ae124/Swedish-Applicaiton-Form-New.pdf)
Invitation – Before application for Schengen visa (migrationsverket.se) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3uMSp63CMp1qBI5AD0WxoD/c569919fa930fd7ff5ab5f1d542e8bfc/241011_Inbjudan_en.pdf)
Consent for underage children ( under 18 ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79ZWkHQvOD5DbhhE90gVXF/6e23d6e1e9d2709779ec98fe879db346/Consent-of-underage.pdf)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer

visa_types.name: Business/Conference/Sports
visa_types.documents_required:
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/jUBidr84litm2eZi5mJRg/ab88c24115b5fcd7c54b75e77e84940d/Business-Cultural-Sports-Official-oct-2025.pdf), also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Sweden Visa Application Form - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/TrOkrZAPRBbIQZ4K0a295/afd3a98e0ab70d64d4e550c44bfe489f/Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-English-Dec-25.pdf)
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5Q7cRNg7zSDmE2TmeREBwk/2c348785e8aca9bcefe07122e38e228a/2cc52dec-2fc4-4745-92b4-43d49ff94e34.pdf)
Note:
Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Note:
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.
- Accredited Travel Insurance (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1i8Cx2z8W2UizhfIiZBHCa/569fac5b35ac932d750166021783b41a/List-of-Schengen-Insurance-Companies-Nov-25__2_.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Business/Conference/Sports]
Please  Note:
The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
 Please click here for other exceptions to the visa fee  (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/Visiting-Sweden/Fees.html )
Service charge:

[Table:  Business/Conference/Sports]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/swe/additional-services)
 
for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS Service charges and other charges) can be paid in cash/ debit card/ credit card/ QR code.
visa_types.processing_time:
If you apply in VFS Global Center, the processing time is 15 days once the application arrives to Sweden Embassy depending on the total number of
applications per day and it may take longer in some cases.
For non-Filipino applicants the processing time might take some longer, but a decision will still be made within 15 days from submitting the application. The reason for the extended processing time is that we cannot issue visas to citizens of certain countries before we have consulted other Schengen member states. This process takes up to seven days.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business/Conference/Sports]
Please  Note:
The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
 Please click here for other exceptions to the visa fee  (https://www.migrationsverket.se/English/Private-individuals/Visiting-Sweden/Fees.html )
Service charge:

[Table:  Business/Conference/Sports]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/swe/additional-services)
 
for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS Service charges and other charges) can be paid in cash/ debit card/ credit card/ QR code.

## Documents Required
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/jUBidr84litm2eZi5mJRg/ab88c24115b5fcd7c54b75e77e84940d/Business-Cultural-Sports-Official-oct-2025.pdf), also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Sweden Visa Application Form - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/TrOkrZAPRBbIQZ4K0a295/afd3a98e0ab70d64d4e550c44bfe489f/Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-English-Dec-25.pdf)
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5Q7cRNg7zSDmE2TmeREBwk/2c348785e8aca9bcefe07122e38e228a/2cc52dec-2fc4-4745-92b4-43d49ff94e34.pdf)
Note:
Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Note:
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.
- Accredited Travel Insurance (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1i8Cx2z8W2UizhfIiZBHCa/569fac5b35ac932d750166021783b41a/List-of-Schengen-Insurance-Companies-Nov-25__2_.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 
General
- The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization). 
- Use coloured photo with plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old (not used in any visas).
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly (hair behind ears).
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–90% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
If you apply in VFS Global Center, the processing time is 15 days once the application arrives to Sweden Embassy depending on the total number of
applications per day and it may take longer in some cases.
For non-Filipino applicants the processing time might take some longer, but a decision will still be made within 15 days from submitting the application. The reason for the extended processing time is that we cannot issue visas to citizens of certain countries before we have consulted other Schengen member states. This process takes up to seven days.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form
English application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2VvEVIJ9r7u46xBL8taCQD/c5b169adbc9b0dd5616398638d0cb4c9/English-Application-Form-New.pdf)
Swedish application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7oySjO8PdYZPxqpgCPS8v4/96f33868ed581230b4754c7c139ae124/Swedish-Applicaiton-Form-New.pdf)
Invitation – Before application for Schengen visa (migrationsverket.se) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3uMSp63CMp1qBI5AD0WxoD/c569919fa930fd7ff5ab5f1d542e8bfc/241011_Inbjudan_en.pdf)
Consent for underage children ( under 18 ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79ZWkHQvOD5DbhhE90gVXF/6e23d6e1e9d2709779ec98fe879db346/Consent-of-underage.pdf)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer
